mechanics.excerpt: The rest remains under Clan control, The Steel Vipers and Jade Falcons shared the farthest anti- spinward section until 3061 when the Vipers attempted to gain total control of the territory: Their campaign backfired, giving the Falcons control of all fifty-three worlds_ Sudeten is the Jade Falcon regional capital.
